description:
Configure the TiddlyWiki Node.js server to load the `katex` and `highlight` plugins, restart the server, and create a technical reference tiddler documenting the Softmax function with working math and syntax highlighting.

Expected Actions:
1. Edit `/home/ga/mywiki/tiddlywiki.info` to add `"tiddlywiki/katex"` and `"tiddlywiki/highlight"` to the `"plugins"` array.
2. Restart the Node.js TiddlyWiki server process (e.g. kill the existing `tiddlywiki` process and run `cd /home/ga/mywiki && nohup tiddlywiki --listen host=0.0.0.0 port=8080 > /home/ga/tiddlywiki.log 2>&1 &` as the `ga` user) so the configuration changes take effect.
3. Reload the TiddlyWiki interface in Firefox at `http://localhost:8080/`.
4. Create a new tiddler titled `Softmax Function`.
5. Add the tags `Math` and `Python`.
6. Insert the following text into the body (use exactly this formatting with `$$` for LaTeX and `
